remarks: Urban Convenience Meets Modern Comfort: Pristine 1BR Stamford Condo  Welcome home to this beautifully updated 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom condominium, where effortless living meets unbeatable location. Situated just one block from the train station, this property is a true commuter's dream. Step inside to find an open-concept, light-filled living area featuring engineered bamboo floors and crown molding. The living room opens up to an expansive, covered patio-offering a rare, oversized outdoor retreat perfect for weekend relaxation or evening lounging. The heart of the home boasts an updated kitchen complete with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances, complemented by a fully modernized bathroom. Key Highlights:  In-Unit Laundry: Private washer and dryer included.  Covered Parking: Enjoy peace of mind with a reserved, covered parking space secure beneath the building.  Neighborhood Amenities: Located moments from Hope Street's popular dining, shopping, and parks, with seamless access to I-95 just a mile away. Whether you are looking for a stylish primary residence or a high-yield investment property with excellent rental potential, this condo delivers. Option to purchase select furniture makes this a truly turn-key opportunity.
